_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warrior family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_focused_rage: Focused Rage (id=420) uses all-ones — rage-costing Warrior attacks cannot be targeted as a sub-type of Warrior family SpellMod; acceptable scope for Protection spec affixes.

confirmed_flags.Bloodrage_2687: [256,0,0] = 0x00000100 (mask0 bit8) — confirms SPELLFAMILY_WARRIOR; carrier for id=420 and id=421

talent_affixes._todo: Shield Specialization (5r, tier 1) — Increases block chance and block value. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Anticipation (5r, tier 1) — Increases defense skill by 4/8/12/16/20. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Bloodrage
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[256,0,0]=0x00000100 (mask0 bit8). No shared Warrior marker bits. Bloodrage instant rage generation +20%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 20).

talent_affixes.name: Focused Rage
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones used — rage-costing Warrior attacks cannot be targeted as a sub-type via family SpellMod; acceptable scope for Protection spec affixes. Bloodrage(2687) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_WARRIOR. Rage cost of all Warrior attacks -1/rank (COST FLAT: -10, rage stored 10x internally).

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Thunder Clap (3r, tier 2) — Reduces rage cost of Thunder Clap by 1/2/3. COST FLAT -1/rank on Thunder Clap (1161) — add after verifying flags with .spellinfo all 1161.
Toughness (5r, tier 2) — Increases armor value from items by 2/4/6/8/10%. Passive item stat multiplier, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Sunder Armor
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16384,0,0]=0x00004000 (mask0 bit14). No shared Warrior marker bits. Sunder Armor rage cost -1/rank (COST FLAT: -10, rage stored 10x internally).

talent_affixes.name: Shield Mastery
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4096,0,0]=0x00001000 (mask0 bit12). No shared Warrior marker bits. Shield Block cooldown -5s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -5000ms). NOTE: talent also increases block value by 15/30% — a second entry (EFFECT1 PCT +15/rank, same flags) can be added if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Hold the Line (2r, tier 5) — After parrying an attack your next Cleave or Heroic Strike deals 5/10% more damage. Proc-based conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Warbringer (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,2,0]=mask1 bit1 (0x00000002). No shared Warrior marker bits. Spell Reflection cooldown -1s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -1000ms).
